2323920.name: Missile City AeroLeague
2323920.description:
Enter Missile City limits and compete in the newest Ponglike, inspired by the head-to-head competition of the arcade era!

Join the AeroLeague and choose from a rogue's gallery of athletes, each with their own unique kit of special moves, and start climbing the ranks in pursuit of Championship Belts!

- Win by getting your disc into the opponent's goal OR by knocking them out!
- Diverse cast of firejammers, street gang leaders, child prodigies, and telekenetic amazons!
- Customize and counterpick by choosing your special moves before each match!
- Local and online multiplayer!
2323920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
